edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Dataset/task-space framing is useful prerequisite context for why multi-view and voxel 3D methods are introduced, though it is not mathematical machinery.
The chain rule is needed to reason about differentiating nonlinear activations during training, but activations can be introduced superficially without it.

edge_labels.source_name: Gradient and Jacobian in vectorized calculus
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Full gradient/Jacobian calculus is not required to understand what activation functions are; it is prerequisite for backprop through activations, not the activation concept itself.

edge_labels.source_name: Activation memory as a separate bottleneck
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: The fine-tuning decision flowchart explicitly depends on diagnosing whether activation memory, not just parameters or optimizer state, is the bottleneck.
VAEs extend the autoencoder latent-code idea into a probabilistic latent-variable model, so the bottleneck/latent-code concept is a direct prerequisite.
Metric alignment is about whether automatic NLG metrics agree with human judgments, so automatic metrics are the source concept being evaluated.
Decoder-only pretraining is causal next-token prediction, a direct application of autoregressive language modeling.
Degeneration under greedy/beam decoding is a failure mode of autoregressive generation, so the source objective/model class is required context.
N-gram language models are count-based next-token/autoregressive models; the broad autoregressive framing helps classify them, though historically n-grams may be taught first.
Span corruption for encoder-decoders is a different denoising/generation pretraining objective; autoregressive LM is useful contrast but not a prerequisite.

edge_labels.source_name: Autoregressive trajectory modeling and prompting in a loop
edge_labels.target_name: Synthetic demonstrations through exploration and relabeling
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Synthetic demonstrations depend on repeatedly prompting/rolling out trajectories, so autoregressive trajectory prompting is operational context for the data-generation loop.

edge_labels.target_name: Distilling reasoning traces into smaller models
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Distilling reasoning traces presupposes traces generated by chain-of-thought style prompting or reasoning supervision.

edge_labels.target_name: Faithfulness and counterfactual evaluation of reasoning
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Faithfulness/counterfactual evaluation assesses whether chain-of-thought rationales actually support answers, so CoT is the object being evaluated.

edge_labels.target_name: Layer-wise Jacobians for activations and affine maps
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Layer-wise Jacobians are the local factors composed by the chain rule during backpropagation.

edge_labels.target_name: Upstream gradient reuse and outer-product parameter gradients
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Upstream-gradient reuse and outer-product parameter gradients are consequences of applying the chain rule efficiently through layers.
FSDP relies on all-gather/reduce-scatter style collectives to shard and materialize parameters/gradients.
ZeRO gradient/optimizer sharding is implemented through distributed collective communication primitives.

edge_labels.target_name: Forward pass and hand-built 2-layer training loop
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: A hand-built training loop uses forward/backward computation over a graph, but the implementation can be taught procedurally with limited graph formalism.
Gradient checking verifies backprop gradients from a computation graph using finite differences.
PyTorch training loops rely on autograd/backprop, though much of the loop structure is API procedure rather than graph theory.
SimCLR and MoCo are concrete contrastive-learning systems optimized around InfoNCE-style positives/negatives.
Filter count, kernel size, stride, and padding are parameters of the local sliding-template convolution operation.
Receptive field and strided downsampling describe how stacked local convolutions expand spatial influence.

edge_labels.source_name: Current LLM benchmark suites and task coverage
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Benchmark contamination is only meaningful once the benchmark suite/task coverage being scored is understood.
Nearest-neighbor classification is a simple instance of the data-driven supervised learning pipeline.
FSDP is a sharded extension of data-parallel distributed training, so baseline data parallelism is prerequisite context.
In-context learning is an emergent use pattern of pretrained decoder-only causal language models; the dependency is conceptual but not strictly mechanistic.

edge_labels.source_name: Classical computer vision and hand-crafted features
edge_labels.target_name: Deep learning resurgence from data, compute, and scale
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Classical hand-crafted features are the historical baseline that motivates why the data/compute/deep-learning resurgence mattered.
Sampling controls are introduced as alternatives to maximum-probability decoding degeneration.
Denotational and distributional semantics are contrasting theories of meaning; one is useful historical contrast but not a prerequisite for understanding the other.
Attachment ambiguity is naturally expressed over dependency or constituency structures; dependency grammar provides one useful representation but is not the only prerequisite.

edge_labels.target_name: Generative modeling p(x) and conditional generation p(x|y)
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: The discriminative/generative contrast helps define what changes when modeling p(x) or p(x|y) instead of p(y|x).

edge_labels.target_name: CNN architecture pattern and historical role
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: CNNs are a canonical architecture for end-to-end learned image feature extraction, though the historical role can be discussed independently.
Convolution is one learned image operator used in end-to-end image systems, but local convolution mechanics can be taught directly.

edge_labels.target_name: FSDP sharding policy and communication overlap
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Sharding policy and overlap are implementation details of FSDP, so FSDP itself is prerequisite.
HSDP composes FSDP within groups with data parallelism across groups, making FSDP a direct prerequisite.

edge_labels.source_name: Generative modeling p(x) and conditional generation p(x|y)
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Autoregressive language modeling is a factorized generative model over sequences, so general generative modeling is prerequisite framing.

edge_labels.source_name: Generative modeling p(x) and conditional generation p(x|y)
edge_labels.target_name: Maximum likelihood estimation for density models
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: MLE fits probabilistic density/generative models by maximizing observed-data likelihood.

edge_labels.source_name: Gradient descent and stochastic gradient descent
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Momentum is a modification of gradient descent/SGD updates with a velocity/running-gradient term.

edge_labels.source_name: Gradient descent and stochastic gradient descent
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: SGD failure modes are defined relative to gradient-descent behavior under conditioning, noise, and geometry.

edge_labels.target_name: Neural radiance fields and differentiable volume rendering
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Neural radiance fields are neural fields rather than exactly implicit surfaces, but implicit geometric representations are useful prerequisite context.
Multi-head attention repeats K/Q/V self-attention equations across multiple projected heads.

edge_labels.target_name: Autoregressive trajectory modeling and prompting in a loop
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Autoregressive trajectory prompting is a modeling method for language-conditioned agents interacting with environments.

edge_labels.target_name: Classical computer vision and hand-crafted features
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: The weakness of raw-pixel linear classifiers motivates hand-engineered feature pipelines, though classical features can be taught historically first.
End-to-end learned image models are motivated by limitations of simpler linear/raw-feature approaches.

edge_labels.source_name: Linear classifier as a parametric score function
edge_labels.target_name: Cross-entropy loss and negative log likelihood
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Cross-entropy is applied to class scores produced by the parametric linear classifier.

edge_labels.source_name: Linear classifier scores and loss functions
edge_labels.target_name: L1, L2, elastic net, and lambda
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Regularization penalties are added to loss functions, so score/loss framing is prerequisite for the objective, though penalty definitions can stand alone.

edge_labels.source_name: Linear classifier scores and loss functions
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Regularization/generalization is introduced as a modification of empirical loss training, but the broad concept is not limited to linear classifiers.

edge_labels.source_name: Linear classifier scores and loss functions
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Weight-preference effects of regularizers are easiest to see when added to a loss over classifier weights.
A neural transition parser predicts actions from parser state/features, replacing sparse symbolic features with embeddings.
BERT-style encoder transfer is based on masked-language-model pretraining.

edge_labels.source_name: Model-free RL successes and sim-to-real limitations
edge_labels.target_name: Learned forward dynamics for model-based planning
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Model-free limitations motivate model-based planning with learned dynamics; this is a motivation-to-alternative dependency.
Adam incorporates momentum-like first-moment estimates, so momentum is direct optimizer prerequisite.
Fixed-window neural LMs are neural successors to short-context n-gram LMs.

edge_labels.source_name: Neural spikes as the basic recorded unit
edge_labels.target_name: Population decoding from noisy motor-cortex activity
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Population decoding aggregates noisy spike-train measurements across neurons/channels.

edge_labels.source_name: Object detection as joint classification and localization
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: DETR object queries emit class/box predictions, so object detection as classification plus localization is prerequisite.

edge_labels.source_name: Object detection as joint classification and localization
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Mask R-CNN extends detection with a mask head, so detection is prerequisite.

edge_labels.source_name: Object detection as joint classification and localization
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: YOLO is a one-stage method for joint classification and localization.

edge_labels.source_name: Observational discovery of emergent RL behaviors
edge_labels.target_name: Concept bottlenecks for controllable RL interventions
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Observational behavior discovery motivates explicit concept bottlenecks for intervention, but the dependency is research-flow rather than core prerequisite.

edge_labels.source_name: Observational discovery of emergent RL behaviors
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Both concern analyzing emergent multi-agent behavior; observational discovery is useful context for intervention graphs but not a strict prerequisite.
Open-ended generation often uses autoregressive LMs, so next-token generation is relevant prerequisite machinery for this evaluation category.
CTC is used when paired neural recordings and target text/phonemes exist but alignment is unknown.

edge_labels.target_name: Real-time decoding stack with GRUs, beam search, and language models
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: A real-time neural decoding stack presupposes paired neural-text data, though architecture/search details are additional machinery.

edge_labels.target_name: AtlasNet and deep implicit shape decoders
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: AtlasNet and related decoders learn mappings from parameter domains or coordinates to shapes, extending parametric/implicit representation ideas.
LoRA is a concrete parameter-efficient fine-tuning method.
Pooling is a downsampling operation affecting receptive fields and equivariance/invariance properties, though it can also be introduced earlier.

edge_labels.source_name: Region proposals and the R-CNN progression
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Mask R-CNN builds on the R-CNN/Faster R-CNN proposal-based detection lineage.
Axis reductions and keepdims require shape/indexing reasoning, though they are sibling tensor operations rather than a deep conceptual dependency.

edge_labels.target_name: Elementwise multiplication, matrix multiplication, and dot products
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Understanding reshaped/indexed tensor dimensions supports choosing valid elementwise, matmul, and dot operations.
Vectorized implementations rely on indexing/reshaping to express computations without loops, but both are closely related tensor-programming skills.

edge_labels.target_name: Teacher forcing and backpropagation through time
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Teacher forcing and BPTT are training procedures for recurrent neural networks.

edge_labels.source_name: Robot learning as interactive sequential decision-making
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: The goal-state-action-reward formulation operationalizes robot learning as sequential decision-making.
Causal masking is a constrained form of self-attention.
Transformer blocks are organized around self-attention plus feed-forward/residual components.
Self-attention is the core mechanism enabling transformer backbones across domains, though cross-domain use also involves patch/token design.
Attention scoring is introduced to overcome the fixed-context bottleneck in seq2seq encoder-decoder models.

edge_labels.target_name: Context vector as a weighted sum
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: The weighted context vector is the mechanism used to bypass the single-vector seq2seq bottleneck.
Encoder-decoder cross-attention is the standard solution to the seq2seq bottleneck.

edge_labels.source_name: Softmax probability model for context prediction
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: The observed-minus-expected gradient form comes from differentiating the softmax context-prediction objective.
Tensor shapes help debug modules, but module composition is an API/design abstraction and does not specifically require broadcasting as prerequisite.
Tensor-shape reasoning is generally useful in PyTorch, but it is too broad to be a specific prerequisite edge for the training-loop concept.
Reshaping/indexing directly depend on understanding tensor dimensions and shape compatibility.

edge_labels.target_name: Sequence classification outputs, loss, and predictions
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Sequence classification inference/training consumes tokenization outputs such as input IDs and attention masks.

edge_labels.target_name: Task-specific model classes and architecture-task matching
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Choosing task-specific Hugging Face model classes depends partly on understanding tokenized inputs, though architecture-task matching is broader.

edge_labels.target_name: ELBO as the VAE training objective
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: The ELBO is derived for the VAE latent-variable model.

edge_labels.target_name: Reparameterization, latent sampling, and disentangling intuition
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Reparameterized sampling and latent-space intuition are mechanisms/properties of VAEs.
Backpropagation in vector-valued networks uses Jacobians/gradient vectors composed by the chain rule.
Local/upstream/downstream gradients are node-level Jacobian-vector chain-rule reasoning.
The skip-gram objective is a method for learning word vectors/embedding spaces.

edge_labels.source_name: RNN/LSTM applications and conditional language models
edge_labels.target_name: Neural machine translation with sequence-to-sequence encoder-decoder models
edge_labels.gpt54_rationale: Seq2seq NMT uses RNN/LSTM conditional language modeling as its core modeling pattern.
Kim-style sentence CNNs rely on pooling over convolutional text features.
RNTNs model compositional semantics over parse trees, so tree-compositional meaning is prerequisite.
The greedy recursive parser uses recursive network scoring/composition to merge constituents.
